dashboard.label: AI Autonomy Oversight — Audit Dashboard
dashboard.description: Full audit trail of autonomous agent decisions with chain-hash verification. Every action is cryptographically linked to the previous one, ensuring tamper-proof accountability.

search.query: index=krittika_consensus sourcetype=krittika:consensus | timechart span=1m avg(latency_ms) as avg_latency | eval threshold=500
index=krittika_audit sourcetype=krittika:audit | search risk_level=high OR action="isolate_node" OR action="restart_service" | stats count

index=krittika_audit sourcetype=krittika:audit | sort - _time | eval status_color=case(stage=="intent" AND status=="PENDING", "🟡 PENDING", stage=="outcome" AND status=="SUCCESS", "🟢 SUCCESS", stage=="outcome" AND status=="FAILED", "🔴 FAILED", true(), "⚪ " . status) | table _time, session_id, sequence_num, stage, status_color, action, prev_hash, current_hash

index=krittika_audit sourcetype=krittika:audit | sort _time | streamstats current=f last(current_hash) as expected_prev_hash | eval chain_valid=case(isnull(expected_prev_hash), "GENESIS", expected_prev_hash==prev_hash, "VALID", true(), "BROKEN") | stats count as total_entries, count(eval(chain_valid=="VALID")) as valid_entries, count(eval(chain_valid=="BROKEN")) as broken_entries, count(eval(chain_valid=="GENESIS")) as genesis_entries | eval integrity_pct=round((valid_entries + genesis_entries) / total_entries * 100, 2) | eval status=if(broken_entries > 0, "COMPROMISED", "INTACT")
index=krittika_audit sourcetype=krittika:audit | timechart span=5m count by stage

index=krittika_audit sourcetype=krittika:audit session_id=$session_id$ | sort sequence_num | table sequence_num, stage, _time, action, status, reasoning_context, evidence_reference, execution_result, health_check, prev_hash, current_hash
